note: Indicative B2B catalog. No public pricing — all items are quote-on-request. Final maker/model confirmation required from vessel nameplate.

en.catalogTitle: Find any part — paste a model, upload a photo, or browse.
en.searchPlaceholder: Search by brand, part number, model, or system
en.noPrice: Prices are quote-only. Each RFQ accounts for vessel, port, urgency, and compatibility verification.
en.photoCta: Don't know the model? Upload a nameplate photo — we identify and match.

tr.catalogTitle: Herhangi bir parça bulun — model girin, fotoğraf yükleyin veya kategorilere göz atın.
tr.searchPlaceholder: Marka, parça numarası, model veya sistem ara
tr.noPrice: Fiyatlar yalnızca tekliftedir. Her RFQ; gemi, liman, aciliyet ve uygunluk doğrulamasına göre hazırlanır.
tr.photoCta: Modeli bilmiyor musunuz? Etiket fotoğrafı yükleyin — biz tanımlayıp eşleştiririz.

categories.summary_en: Vessel-specific electrical, navigation, communication, automation, and safety systems built to class and SOLAS.
categories.summary_tr: Class ve SOLAS uyumlu, gemiye özel elektrik, seyir, haberleşme, otomasyon ve emniyet sistemleri.

subcategories.hint_en: Furuno, JRC, Sperry — magnetrons, antennas, ECDIS, gyro
Sailor, JRC, Jotron — INMARSAT, MF/HF, EPIRB, SART
Consilium, Autronica, Salwico — loop cards, detectors
Praxis, Kongsberg, Mega-Guard, BNWAS modules
Siemens S7, Allen-Bradley, Omron — I/O for skids
Optimarin, Alfa Laval, Wartsila — UV lamps, sensors
Pressure, level, temperature, vibration for ship service
Aqua Signal, Den Haan — masthead, port/stbd, anchor LED
AVR, shaft gen breakers, sync panels, marine ACBs
EPIRB, lifebuoy lights, SART, GMDSS reserve batteries

categories.summary_en: Industrial-grade electrical components used onboard but not marine-specific — cables, breakers, drives, motors.
categories.summary_tr: Gemide kullanılan ancak yalnızca denizciliğe özel olmayan endüstriyel elektrik bileşenleri.

subcategories.hint_en: ABB, Schneider, Siemens, Mitsubishi — MCCB, ACB, AF, TeSys
ABB M3BP, Vacon, Danfoss FC — marine duty motors and VFDs
Lapp Olflex Marine FHF, Hawke ATEX glands
Beijer, Weintek, Pro-face — operator interfaces
NorthStar AGM, Effekta online UPS, charger modules
Megger, Fluke, FLIR — IR, multimeter, thermography
Phoenix Contact, Weidmuller — terminals, jumpers

categories.summary_en: Mechanical marine parts — valves, fittings, fans, gaskets, consumables for engine room and deck.
categories.summary_tr: Mekanik denizcilik parçaları — vana, rakor, fan, conta, makine dairesi ve güverte sarf malzemeleri.

subcategories.hint_en: ASCO, Burkert — pneumatic, ATEX, fluid control
ebm-papst, Witt Sun — axial, EC, cabinet cooling
Level switches, sealing kits, gaskets
Mooring fittings, hatch latches, deck plate hardware

products.name: Example — LED Navigation Light (masthead)
products.shortDescription: Template product — copy this block to add a real item we sell. Fill name, brand, part number, image and descriptions; keep source/source_url as an internal sourcing note (not shown to customers).
products.description_en: Template product. Duplicate this entry in content/products.json for each item we want to sell, set the fields, and drop the photo into public/assets/supply/. Customers see name, brand, part number, photo and a 'Get quote' button — never a price.
products.description_tr: Şablon ürün. Satmak istediğimiz her kalem için bu kaydı content/products.json içinde kopyala, alanları doldur ve fotoğrafı public/assets/supply/ altına koy. Müşteri yalnızca ad, marka, parça no, foto ve 'Teklif al' görür — fiyat asla.
products.longDescription: This is a worked example so the catalog format is clear. Replace every field with the real product's data. The image path is relative to /public.
products.imageHint: Product photo on white background.
products.disclaimer: Example/template entry — replace with a real product before launch.

products.name: Furuno MG5436 Radar Magnetron
products.shortDescription: 25kW S-band magnetron for Furuno FAR-2xx7 and FR-21x5 radar series — most-replaced consumable on bulker bridges.
products.description_en: 25kW S-band magnetron for Furuno FAR-2xx7 and FR-21x5 radar series — most-replaced consumable on bulker bridges.
products.description_tr: Furuno FAR-2xx7 ve FR-21x5 radar serisi için 25kW S-band magnetron — bulker köprü üstünde en sık değişen sarf parçası.
products.longDescription:
The Furuno MG5436 magnetron is the standard 25 kW S-band tube used on FAR-2xx7 and FR-21x5 series radars. Magnetrons are wear items with a typical service life of 4,000-6,000 hours under normal duty. PSC and class surveyors increasingly check radar performance during navigation audits; degraded magnetrons show as weak target returns and missed plot acquisition.

Replacement requires antenna unit isolation, high-voltage discharge of the modulator section, and post-installation performance monitor calibration (FAR-2xx7 menu 7.2). Always carry one as ship's spare for SOLAS Ch.V Reg.19 compliance.
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-72h to most ports via authorized OEM channel
products.imageHint: Glass-bodied vacuum magnetron with copper heatsink fins, studio shot.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Furuno MG5223F X-band Magnetron 25kW
products.shortDescription: X-band 25kW magnetron for Furuno FAR-2xx7 X-band variant — standard bulker ARPA spare.
products.description_en: X-band 25kW magnetron for Furuno FAR-2xx7 X-band variant — standard bulker ARPA spare.
products.description_tr: Furuno FAR-2xx7 X-band varyantı için X-band 25kW magnetron — standart bulker ARPA yedeği.
products.longDescription: X-band counterpart to the MG5436, used on the FAR-2xx7 X-band ARPA radar. Typical pairing on bulkers and tankers is one X-band + one S-band radar with shared display console. Carry both magnetron types as ship's spare.
products.imageHint: X-band magnetron with copper heatsink.
products.disclaimer: Confirm radar transceiver part number from vessel nameplate.

products.name: JRC JMA-9132 ECDIS Processor Board
products.shortDescription: Replacement processor board for JRC JMA-9132 ECDIS — covers chart engine and AIS/ARPA integration.
products.description_en: Replacement processor board for JRC JMA-9132 ECDIS — covers chart engine and AIS/ARPA integration.
products.description_tr: JRC JMA-9132 ECDIS için yedek işlemci kartı — chart engine ve AIS/ARPA entegrasyonu.
products.longDescription: The JMA-9132 ECDIS uses a swappable processor board for the chart engine. Failure modes: black-screen on boot, unresponsive panel, chart not loading. Always update ENC permits after board swap.
products.imageHint: Green PCB with EPROM and ribbon connector.
products.disclaimer: Confirm board revision (-A/-B/-C) before order.

products.name: Sperry Marine Mk39 Gyro Compass Card
products.name_en: Sperry Marine Mk39 Gyro Compass Card
products.name_tr: Sperry Marine Mk39 Cayro Pusula Kartı
products.shortDescription: Control card for Sperry Mk39 gyro compass — primary heading source on bulker bridges.
products.description_en: Control card for Sperry Mk39 gyro compass — primary heading source on bulker bridges.
products.description_tr: Sperry Mk39 cayro pusula için kontrol kartı — bulker köprü üstünde birincil yön kaynağı.
products.longDescription: Sperry Mk39 is the de facto gyro compass for merchant fleets. The control card handles heading output, follow-up, and step/sin-cos repeater signals. Replacement card must be re-aligned with gyro sphere before sea use.
products.imageHint: Brown bakelite chassis card with rotary trim pots.
products.disclaimer: OEM serial verification required; class survey alignment needed after replacement.

products.name: Sailor FleetBroadband 500 Below-Deck Unit
products.shortDescription: INMARSAT FleetBroadband 500 below-deck modem — voice + 432 kbps IP data over Ka/L-band.
products.description_en: INMARSAT FleetBroadband 500 below-deck modem — voice + 432 kbps IP data over Ka/L-band.
products.description_tr: INMARSAT FleetBroadband 500 güverte altı modemi — Ka/L-band üzerinden ses + 432 kbps IP veri.
products.longDescription: Sailor FB500 is the workhorse INMARSAT FleetBroadband terminal on bulker fleets. Below-deck unit handles SIM, ISDN, Ethernet ports, and PBX integration. Replacement requires SIM swap and recommissioning per IMSO.
products.imageHint: Grey 1U chassis with Cobham branding and front status LEDs.
products.disclaimer: SIM/MSN re-provisioning required by airtime provider.

products.name: Sailor 6310 MF/HF DSC Class A Transceiver
products.name_en: Sailor 6310 MF/HF DSC Class A Transceiver
products.name_tr: Sailor 6310 MF/HF DSC Class A Transciver
products.shortDescription: 150W GMDSS MF/HF transceiver, DSC class A — mandatory for SOLAS sea area A2/A3.
products.description_en: 150W GMDSS MF/HF transceiver, DSC class A — mandatory for SOLAS sea area A2/A3.
products.description_tr: 150W GMDSS MF/HF transciver, DSC class A — SOLAS deniz alanı A2/A3 için zorunlu.
products.longDescription: Sailor 6310 is the dominant MF/HF GMDSS transceiver onboard merchant vessels. Includes DSC controller, watch receiver, and printer port. Replacement triggers radio survey re-issue.
products.imageHint: Grey-black GMDSS transceiver chassis with handset cradle and indicator panel.
products.disclaimer: Radio survey by flag-approved surveyor required after replacement.

products.name: Jotron Tron 60S Cat.1 EPIRB
products.shortDescription: Cospas-Sarsat 406 MHz Category 1 float-free EPIRB with GPS — primary GMDSS distress beacon.
products.description_en: Cospas-Sarsat 406 MHz Category 1 float-free EPIRB with GPS — primary GMDSS distress beacon.
products.description_tr: Cospas-Sarsat 406 MHz Kategori 1 yüzerli EPIRB, GPS'li — birincil GMDSS imdat beacon.
products.longDescription: Required SOLAS Ch.IV equipment. HRU expires every 2 years, battery every 5-6 years. MMSI re-programming through authorized service required after replacement.
products.imageHint: Yellow EPIRB beacon in red bracket with HRU.
products.disclaimer: Country-coded MMSI re-programming required.

products.name: Daniamant L160 LED Lifebuoy Self-Igniting Light
products.name_en: Daniamant L160 LED Lifebuoy Self-Igniting Light
products.name_tr: Daniamant L160 LED Cankurtaran Simidi Otomatik Lambası
products.shortDescription: SOLAS LSA-compliant self-igniting LED lifebuoy light, water-activated, 2+ hour runtime.
products.description_en: SOLAS LSA-compliant self-igniting LED lifebuoy light, water-activated, 2+ hour runtime.
products.description_tr: SOLAS LSA uyumlu otomatik yanan LED cankurtaran lambası, su ile aktive, 2+ saat çalışma.
products.longDescription: Each MOB lifebuoy on bridge wings and main deck needs a fitted L160. Class surveyors check date stamp at each annual survey.
products.imageHint: Bright orange cylindrical lifebuoy light with clear LED dome.
products.disclaimer: Verify battery expiry date stamp.

products.name: Optimarin OBS BWTS UV Lamp Module
products.name_en: Optimarin OBS BWTS UV Lamp Module
products.name_tr: Optimarin OBS BWTS UV Lamba Modülü
products.shortDescription: Replacement UV lamp for Optimarin Ballast System (OBS) — 35 kW chamber, certified BWMS spare.
products.description_en: Replacement UV lamp for Optimarin Ballast System (OBS) — 35 kW chamber, certified BWMS spare.
products.description_tr: Optimarin Ballast Sistemi (OBS) için yedek UV lamba — 35 kW reaktör, sertifikalı BWMS yedeği.
products.longDescription: UV lamps inside Optimarin BWTS reactors have a finite life (~5,000 hours). Lamp failure trips the BWMS and prevents ballast operations. Always carry one full set as ship's spare per IMO BWM Convention.
products.imageHint: Long quartz-encased UV tube with end fittings.
products.disclaimer: Lamp serial logging required for class BWMS compliance.

products.name: Alfa Laval PureBallast UV Intensity Sensor
products.name_en: Alfa Laval PureBallast UV Intensity Sensor
products.name_tr: Alfa Laval PureBallast UV Yoğunluk Sensörü
products.shortDescription: UV intensity sensor for Alfa Laval PureBallast 3 — verifies UV dose per BWM Convention.
products.description_en: UV intensity sensor for Alfa Laval PureBallast 3 — verifies UV dose per BWM Convention.
products.description_tr: Alfa Laval PureBallast 3 için UV yoğunluk sensörü — BWM Convention'a göre UV dozunu doğrular.
products.longDescription: Critical sensor for BWMS dose verification. Failure causes the system to detect under-dosing and prevents ballast discharge. Stock at least one as ship's spare.
products.imageHint: Stainless cylindrical sensor with optical window and threaded mount.
products.disclaimer: Calibration certificate required for class acceptance.

products.name: Consilium Salwico CS4000 Detector Loop Card
products.name_en: Consilium Salwico CS4000 Detector Loop Card
products.name_tr: Consilium Salwico CS4000 Dedektör Loop Kartı
products.shortDescription: Addressable detector loop card for Salwico CS4000 fire detection — supports 250 devices per loop.
products.description_en: Addressable detector loop card for Salwico CS4000 fire detection — supports 250 devices per loop.
products.description_tr: Salwico CS4000 yangın algılama için adreslenebilir dedektör loop kartı — loop başına 250 cihaz.
products.longDescription: SOLAS Ch.II-2 compliant. Required spare per IMO MSC.1/Circ.1432. Hot-swappable.
products.imageHint: Green PCB Eurocard with edge connector and status LEDs.
products.disclaimer: Confirm CS4000 firmware version compatibility.

products.name: Autronica BS-100 Addressable Smoke Detector
products.shortDescription: Optical addressable smoke detector for Autronica AutroSafe — engine room and accommodation use.
products.description_en: Optical addressable smoke detector for Autronica AutroSafe — engine room and accommodation use.
products.description_tr: Autronica AutroSafe için optik adreslenebilir duman dedektörü — makine dairesi ve yaşam mahalli.
products.longDescription: Standard addressable detector on Autronica AutroSafe panels. Field-replaceable; sensitivity calibrated at OEM service.
products.imageHint: White-domed smoke detector with twist-lock base.
products.disclaimer: Address programming required at install.

products.name: Praxis Selma Mk2 Alarm Distribution Unit
products.name_en: Praxis Selma Mk2 Alarm Distribution Unit
products.name_tr: Praxis Selma Mk2 Alarm Dağıtım Ünitesi
products.shortDescription: Bridge alarm distribution / BNWAS unit from Praxis Mega-Guard family.
products.description_en: Bridge alarm distribution / BNWAS unit from Praxis Mega-Guard family.
products.description_tr: Praxis Mega-Guard ailesinden köprü üstü alarm dağıtım / BNWAS ünitesi.
products.longDescription: Bridges engine, cargo, and nav alarms to bridge BNWAS per IMO MSC.282(86). Internal redundancy and dual PSU.
products.imageHint: Slate-grey rack-mount unit with LEDs and labelled buttons.
products.disclaimer: Vessel alarm logic file required from OEM.

products.name: Kongsberg K-Chief 600 I/O Card RIO-16DI
products.shortDescription: 16-channel digital input remote I/O card for Kongsberg K-Chief AMS/IAS rack.
products.description_en: 16-channel digital input remote I/O card for Kongsberg K-Chief AMS/IAS rack.
products.description_tr: Kongsberg K-Chief AMS/IAS rack için 16 kanal dijital giriş uzak I/O kartı.
products.longDescription: K-Chief 600 is widely installed on Norwegian and Korean-built vessels. RIO cards are hot-swappable; spare them by I/O type to match vessel rack.
products.imageHint: Grey-blue Kongsberg I/O module with screw terminals.
products.disclaimer: OEM-channel only; configure with vessel topology file.

products.name: Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500 16-Channel DI Module
products.name_tr: Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500 16 Kanal DI Modülü
products.shortDescription: 16-channel 24V DC digital input module for SIMATIC S7-1500 PLC — used in vessel IAS/AMS racks.
products.description_en: 16-channel 24V DC digital input module for SIMATIC S7-1500 PLC — used in vessel IAS/AMS racks.
products.description_tr: SIMATIC S7-1500 PLC için 16 kanal 24V DC dijital giriş modülü — gemi IAS/AMS rack'lerinde kullanılır.
products.longDescription: Scans status signals from limit switches, level floats, pressure switches feeding the integrated automation system. Hot-swap supported. Front connector 6ES7592 series sold separately.
products.imageHint: Dark-grey Siemens I/O module on rack.
products.disclaimer: Verify TIA Portal version compatibility (v15+).

products.name: Allen-Bradley CompactLogix 5069-L306ER Controller
products.shortDescription: CompactLogix 5380 controller, 3MB memory, dual Ethernet — used in BWMS, IGG, and HVAC skids.
products.description_en: CompactLogix 5380 controller, 3MB memory, dual Ethernet — used in BWMS, IGG, and HVAC skids.
products.description_tr: CompactLogix 5380 kontrolcü, 3MB hafıza, çift Ethernet — BWMS, IGG ve HVAC skidlerde kullanılır.
products.longDescription: Studio 5000 v32+. SD card needed for app program; backup before swap. Common fault: Ethernet ring topology mismatch.
products.imageHint: White and red Allen-Bradley controller block with dual RJ45.
products.disclaimer: Confirm Studio 5000 project version.

products.name: Endress+Hauser Cerabar PMC71 Pressure Transmitter
products.shortDescription: Ceramic capacitive pressure transmitter, 4-20mA HART — fuel oil, lube oil, sea water service.
products.description_en: Ceramic capacitive pressure transmitter, 4-20mA HART — fuel oil, lube oil, sea water service.
products.description_tr: Seramik kapasitif basınç transmitter, 4-20mA HART — yakıt, yağ ve deniz suyu hizmeti.
products.longDescription: De facto choice for retrofit pressure points. SIL2 capable. Confirm wetted material (316L SS standard).
products.imageHint: Stainless transmitter with LCD and threaded process connection.
products.disclaimer: Configure to vessel nameplate spec.

products.name: VEGAPULS C 21 Compact Radar Level Sensor
products.name_en: VEGAPULS C 21 Compact Radar Level Sensor
products.name_tr: VEGAPULS C 21 Kompakt Radar Seviye Sensörü
products.shortDescription: 80 GHz non-contact radar level sensor, 0-15m, Bluetooth setup — ballast and FW tank monitoring.
products.description_en: 80 GHz non-contact radar level sensor, 0-15m, Bluetooth setup — ballast and FW tank monitoring.
products.description_tr: 80 GHz temassız radar seviye sensörü, 0-15m, Bluetooth kurulumu — balast ve tatlı su tankı monitoring.
products.longDescription: Strong upgrade over float and ultrasonic in HFO and dirty bilge service. Built-in echo curve diagnostics.
products.imageHint: Compact plastic radar sensor with threaded mount.
products.disclaimer: Class approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV.

products.name: Pt100 RTD Temperature Probe, Marine Duty
products.name_en: Pt100 RTD Temperature Probe, Marine Duty
products.name_tr: Pt100 RTD Sıcaklık Probu, Marin Kullanım
products.shortDescription: Pt100 4-wire RTD with thermowell, 1/3 DIN class B — engine cooling and lube oil service.
products.description_en: Pt100 4-wire RTD with thermowell, 1/3 DIN class B — engine cooling and lube oil service.
products.description_tr: Pt100 4-telli RTD termo kuyulu, 1/3 DIN class B — motor soğutma ve yağ hizmeti.
products.longDescription: Standard Pt100 for engine alarm/trip duty per IACS UR M35.
products.imageHint: Stainless temperature probe with junction head.
products.disclaimer: Confirm insertion length and process connection.

products.name: Aqua Signal Series 55 LED Masthead Light
products.name_en: Aqua Signal Series 55 LED Masthead Light
products.name_tr: Aqua Signal Series 55 LED Direk Feneri
products.shortDescription: COLREG-72 compliant LED masthead light, 225-deg sector — direct retrofit for incandescent S55.
products.description_en: COLREG-72 compliant LED masthead light, 225-deg sector — direct retrofit for incandescent S55.
products.description_tr: COLREG-72 uyumlu LED direk feneri, 225-derece sektör — Akkor S55'in doğrudan retrofiti.
products.longDescription: Direct retrofit; lens and housing remain. Wheelmark MED 2014/90/EU approved.
products.imageHint: Black anodized nav lantern with Fresnel lens.
products.disclaimer: Photometric check with surveyor recommended after install.

products.name: Den Haan DHR70N LED Port/Starboard Side Lights (Pair)
products.name_en: Den Haan DHR70N LED Port/Starboard Side Lights
products.name_tr: Den Haan DHR70N LED Iskele/Sancak Borda Fenerleri (Çift)
products.shortDescription: Red/green LED side lights, 112.5-deg sector — heavy-duty Dutch bronze housing.
products.description_en: Red/green LED side lights, 112.5-deg sector — heavy-duty Dutch bronze housing.
products.description_tr: Kırmızı/yeşil LED borda fenerleri, 112.5-derece sektör — sağlam Hollanda bronz gövde.
products.longDescription: LED engine kit drops into existing housing; verify dichroic filter integrity.
products.imageHint: Pair of bronze marine lanterns red/green.
products.disclaimer: Wheelmark MED approved.

products.name: Stamford MX341 Automatic Voltage Regulator
products.shortDescription: AVR for Stamford HC4/HC5/HC6/HC7 marine alternators — standard generator field controller.
products.description_en: AVR for Stamford HC4/HC5/HC6/HC7 marine alternators — standard generator field controller.
products.description_tr: Stamford HC4/HC5/HC6/HC7 marin alternatörler için AVR — standart jeneratör alan kontrolcüsü.
products.longDescription: Most-failed item on bulker generator panels. Verify chassis revision; MX341 has selectable input sensing for PMG vs shunt excitation.
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-72h ex stock; AOG air freight available
products.imageHint: Green PCB AVR with potentiometers and finned aluminum chassis.
products.disclaimer: Confirm PMG vs shunt excitation; align trim pots after install.

products.name: Terasaki AR208S Air Circuit Breaker 800A
products.shortDescription: Air circuit breaker, 800A frame, marine MSB outgoing — Korean and Japanese-built bulkers.
products.description_en: Air circuit breaker, 800A frame, marine MSB outgoing — Korean and Japanese-built bulkers.
products.description_tr: Açık tip şalter, 800A çerçeve, marin MSB çıkışı — Kore ve Japon yapımı bulkerlerde.
products.longDescription: Standard ACB on Hyundai HEC and similar Korean MSB assemblies. Check Trip Unit (AGR-21B/22B) compatibility and arc-chute condition.
products.imageHint: Black draw-out ACB with toggle handle in panel cutout.
products.disclaimer: Verify trip unit and accessory ordering.

products.name: ABB AF50-30-11 3-Pole Contactor
products.shortDescription: 3-pole AC/DC wide-band coil contactor, 50A AC-3 — pump and compressor starters.
products.description_en: 3-pole AC/DC wide-band coil contactor, 50A AC-3 — pump and compressor starters.
products.description_tr: 3-kutuplu AC/DC geniş bant bobinli kontaktör, 50A AC-3 — pompa ve kompresör starterleri.
products.longDescription: Wide-band coil eliminates need to stock multiple coil variants. Direct retrofit for older A-line A50-30 contactors. IEC 60947-4-1 compliant.
products.imageHint: Black 3-pole industrial contactor with silver terminals.
products.disclaimer: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV approvals on request.

products.name: Schneider TeSys D LC1D18BD Contactor
products.shortDescription: TeSys D series 3-pole contactor, 18A AC-3, 24V DC coil — galley and HVAC starters.
products.description_en: TeSys D series 3-pole contactor, 18A AC-3, 24V DC coil — galley and HVAC starters.
products.description_tr: TeSys D serisi 3-kutuplu kontaktör, 18A AC-3, 24V DC bobin — galley ve HVAC starterleri.
products.longDescription: D-frame footprint identical to older Telemecanique LC1-D18. Auxiliary contact block LADN11 sold separately.
products.imageHint: Compact DIN-rail contactor with green Schneider label.
products.disclaimer: Marine type approval on request from Schneider.

products.name: Siemens SIRIUS 3RT2026-1BB40 Power Contactor
products.shortDescription: SIRIUS S0 power contactor, 25A AC-3, 24V DC coil — common feeder/starter device.
products.description_en: SIRIUS S0 power contactor, 25A AC-3, 24V DC coil — common feeder/starter device.
products.description_tr: SIRIUS S0 güç kontaktörü, 25A AC-3, 24V DC bobin — yaygın feeder/starter cihazı.
products.longDescription: 30M mechanical operating cycles. SIVACON 8PS-compatible. UL/CSA listed; marine approvals on request.
products.imageHint: Dark-grey SIRIUS contactor with red coil terminal cover.
products.disclaimer: DNV/ABS/Lloyd's approvals available.

products.name: Mitsubishi NF250-CV 3P 250A MCCB
products.shortDescription: Molded-case circuit breaker, 250A frame, 3-pole, 36kA Icu — Asian-built MSB feeders.
products.description_en: Molded-case circuit breaker, 250A frame, 3-pole, 36kA Icu — Asian-built MSB feeders.
products.description_tr: Kompakt tip şalter, 250A çerçeve, 3-kutuplu, 36kA Icu — Asya yapımı MSB beslemeleri.
products.longDescription: Direct successor to NF250-SP/NF250-S. Auxiliary contacts and shunt trip ordered separately.
products.imageHint: Beige Mitsubishi MCCB panel-mounted.
products.disclaimer: NK, DNV, ABS approvals available.

products.name: Eaton PN2 Series 160A MCCB
products.shortDescription: 160A 3-pole moulded-case circuit breaker — sub-distribution feeder duty.
products.description_en: 160A 3-pole moulded-case circuit breaker — sub-distribution feeder duty.
products.description_tr: 160A 3-kutuplu kompakt tip şalter — alt dağıtım beslemesi.
products.longDescription: Workhorse mid-frame MCCB for engine room sub-distribution. Thermal-magnetic trip; field-adjustable.
products.imageHint: Grey Eaton MCCB with toggle handle.
products.disclaimer: Confirm trip curve and aux contact requirement.

products.name: ABB M3BP 132SMB4 Marine IE3 Motor 7.5 kW
products.name_en: ABB M3BP 132SMB4 Marine IE3 Motor 7.5 kW
products.name_tr: ABB M3BP 132SMB4 Marin IE3 Motor 7.5 kW
products.shortDescription: IE3 cast-iron 7.5 kW 4-pole marine motor, IP55, B3 mount — pumps, fans, compressors.
products.description_en: IE3 cast-iron 7.5 kW 4-pole marine motor, IP55, B3 mount — pumps, fans, compressors.
products.description_tr: IE3 dökme demir 7.5 kW 4-kutuplu marin motor, IP55, B3 montaj — pompa, fan, kompresör.
products.longDescription: Marine paint system C5-M. Confirm shaft height, mounting type (B3/B5/B14), and starting method.
products.imageHint: ABB navy-blue cast-iron motor on aluminum base.
products.disclaimer: Class approvals available.

products.name: Vacon 100 FLOW 22kW VFD
products.shortDescription: 22kW variable frequency drive optimized for pump/fan duty — sea water and HVAC pumps.
products.description_en: 22kW variable frequency drive optimized for pump/fan duty — sea water and HVAC pumps.
products.description_tr: 22kW değişken frekanslı sürücü, pompa/fan görevi için optimize — deniz suyu ve HVAC pompaları.
products.longDescription: Pump/fan profile with sleep mode and multi-pump cascade. Modbus/PROFINET on board.
products.imageHint: Grey Vacon VFD with display module on top.
products.disclaimer: Confirm motor rating and EMC filter requirement.

products.name: Lapp Olflex Marine FHF 4x2.5 mm² Power Cable
